name: Kanami Etou
description: Kanami Etou is a second-year student in the middle division of Minoseki Academy. Her sword is Chidori. She's in the middle division, but she has the sword skills to be a representative for the school. She is a cheerful and positive girl who has many friends. She is a sword technique enthusiast, to the point that her eyes change color when someone talks about techniques. She especially loves sword matches.
